content.text:
Based on my visual inspection of the molecule from multiple angles, I can now identify the neighbor atoms of atom 17 (Carbon).

**Neighbor atoms of C:17:**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|-------------|---------|
| 16 | C |
| 18 | C |
| 23 | C |

**geomconf_index:** 9986

Atom 17 (Carbon) has three covalent bonds connecting it to:
- **C:16** - part of the same aromatic ring (below C:17)
- **C:18** - part of the same aromatic ring (above C:17)
- **C:23** - connects to an adjacent fused ring system (to the right of C:17)

This is consistent with an sp² hybridized carbon in an aromatic/conjugated ring system, where carbon forms three σ-bonds.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 17, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
